🧼
Skincare

Rinrobe Natural Skincare

Artisan natural skincare from Achill Island

📍 Cashel Market📍 Keel Market

About Rinrobe Natural Skincare

Rinrobe is an artisan natural skincare brand based on Achill Island. Named after the beautiful Rinrobe area on the island, every product is handmade using natural ingredients — no harsh chemicals, no artificial fragrances, just pure, honest skincare.

The star products are the solid shampoo bars and artisan soap bars. The shampoo bars are plastic-free, long-lasting and gentle on hair and scalp. The soap bars are beautifully crafted with natural essential oils and botanicals, making them a treat for the skin and the senses.

Rinrobe represents the best of what Achill Island has to offer — locally made, environmentally conscious products that work beautifully. Perfect for gifts, or for anyone looking to switch to a more natural skincare routine.

What You'll Find

🧴 Solid Shampoo Bars

Plastic-free, long-lasting shampoo bars — gentle on hair and the environment.

🧼 Artisan Soap Bars

Handmade soap bars with natural essential oils and botanicals.

🌿 Natural Ingredients

No harsh chemicals — everything is made from natural, skin-friendly ingredients.

🎁 Gift Sets

Beautifully packaged gift sets — perfect presents from Achill Island.
